---
title: "Timeline_Sensitivity_Test"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

```


```{r}
#Step 1: Prepare the data

Modified_medication <- Modified_medication %>%
  filter(!(sample == "SL558547" & is.na(treatment_group)))

Modified_medication %>%
     count(treatment_group, sort = TRUE) %>%
     print(n = 30)

Modified_medication %>%
     group_by(sample) %>%
     summarise(all_na_type = all(is.na(treatment_group))) %>%
     count(all_na_type)


med_for_sensitivity <- Modified_medication %>%
  rename(
    start_year = AgeAtTreatmentStart.mod,
    end_year   = AgeAtMedStop,
    type       = treatment_group
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    type = case_when(
      Medication == "Paclitaxel (protein bound)" ~ "Chemo", # Match the drug name here
      TRUE ~ type                                          # Keep other types as they are
    )
  )

#Step 2: Check what treatment types exist

table(med_for_sensitivity$type)

```

```{r}
#Step 3: Define the window function

has_concurrent_window <- function(df, type_a, type_b, window_years = 0) {
  df2 <- df %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      type = as.character(type),
      t0   = as.numeric(start_year),
      t1   = as.numeric(end_year)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(type),                          # drop NA treatment types
      !is.na(t0), !is.na(t1),
      is.finite(t0), is.finite(t1)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      t0 = pmin(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE),
      t1 = pmax(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  a <- df2[df2$type == type_a, , drop = FALSE]
  b <- df2[df2$type == type_b, , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(a) == 0 || nrow(b) == 0) return(FALSE)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(a))) {
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(b))) {
      overlap <- max(a$t0[i], b$t0[j]) < min(a$t1[i], b$t1[j]) + window_years
      if (!is.na(overlap) && overlap) return(TRUE)
    }
  }
  FALSE
}

```

```{r}

#Step 4: Define the sensitivity sweep function

sensitivity_concurrent <- function(data, type_a, type_b,
                                   windows_weeks = c(0, 1, 2, 4, 6, 8)) {
  windows_years <- windows_weeks / 52

  purrr::map_dfr(windows_years, function(w) {
    data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        concurrent = has_concurrent_window(
          dplyr::cur_data(), type_a, type_b, window_years = w
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        window_weeks     = w * 52,
        n_concurrent     = sum(concurrent),
        n_not_concurrent = sum(!concurrent),
        pct_concurrent   = round(mean(concurrent) * 100, 1)
      )
  })
}

```

```{r}
#Step 5: Run across all pairs

pairs <- list(
  c("Chemo", "IO"),
  c("Chemo", "Radiation"),
  c("IO",    "Radiation")
)

sensitivity_all <- purrr::map_dfr(pairs, function(p) {
  sensitivity_concurrent(
    med_for_sensitivity,
    type_a = p[1],
    type_b = p[2]
  ) %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste(p[1], "vs", p[2]), .before = 1)
})

print(sensitivity_all)

```

```{r}
#Step 6: Plot

ggplot(sensitivity_all, aes(x = window_weeks, y = pct_concurrent, color = comparison)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4.3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  annotate("text", x = 4.3, y = max(sensitivity_all$pct_concurrent),
           label = "Monthly grid\n(~4.3 wks)", hjust = -0.1, size = 3, color = "gray50") +
  labs(
    x     = "Concurrency window (weeks)",
    y     = "% patients classified as concurrent",
    title = "LUSC: Sensitivity of concurrent treatment classification to time window",
    color = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous/LUSC_Sensitivity_result.png", width = 6, height = 4)

```

```{r}
# ---- Concurrent pairs (window-sensitive) ----
pairs <- list(
  c("Chemo", "IO"),
  c("Chemo", "Radiation"),
  c("IO",    "Radiation"),
  c("Chemo",  "Targeted")
)

sensitivity_all <- purrr::map_dfr(pairs, function(p) {
  sensitivity_concurrent(
    med_for_sensitivity,
    type_a = p[1],
    type_b = p[2]
  ) %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste(p[1], "vs", p[2]), .before = 1)
})

# ---- Single modality only (window-independent) ----
single_modality <- med_for_sensitivity %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    types_present = list(unique(type[!is.na(type)])),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    only_Chemo     = map_lgl(types_present, ~ length(.x) == 1 && "Chemo"     %in% .x),
    only_IO        = map_lgl(types_present, ~ length(.x) == 1 && "IO"        %in% .x),
    only_Radiation = map_lgl(types_present, ~ length(.x) == 1 && "Radiation" %in% .x),
    only_Targeted  = map_lgl(types_present, ~ length(.x) == 1 &&
                               any(.x %in% c("Targeted", "Small_Molecule")))
  ) %>%
  # calculate pct directly from logical columns — don't sum first
  summarise(
    n_total            = n(),
    pct_only_Chemo     = round(mean(only_Chemo)     * 100, 1),
    pct_only_IO        = round(mean(only_IO)         * 100, 1),
    pct_only_Radiation = round(mean(only_Radiation)  * 100, 1),
    pct_only_Targeted  = round(mean(only_Targeted)   * 100, 1)
  )

print(single_modality)

# At window = 0 (exact overlap), combine both summaries into one bar chart
concurrent_at_zero <- sensitivity_all %>%
  filter(window_weeks == 2) %>%
  select(comparison, pct_concurrent) %>%
  rename(category = comparison, pct = pct_concurrent) %>%
  mutate(type = "Concurrent")

single_mod_long <- single_modality %>%
  select(starts_with("pct_only")) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), 
               names_to = "category", 
               values_to = "pct") %>%
  mutate(
    category = str_remove(category, "pct_only_"),
    category = paste("Only", category),
    type     = "Single modality"
  )

bind_rows(concurrent_at_zero, single_mod_long) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(category, pct), y = pct, fill = type)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "% of patients",
    title = "LUSC: Treatment pattern landscape",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous/LUSC_Sensitivity_result_with other_medication.png", width = 6, height = 4)

```
